name: Technos S.A.
summary: Technos S.A., together with its subsidiaries, develops, assembles, and distributes watches. The company offers watches under the Technos, Mormaii, Seiko, Euro, Mariner, Timex, Allora, Touch, Dumont, Condor, Fossil, Diesel, Marc Jacobs, Armani Exchange, DKNY, Emp√É¬≥rio Armani, Adidas, Michael Kors, Tory Burch, Burberry, and Skagen brands. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 15 outlets and 55 exclusive points of sale franchise stores. It distributes its products through department, specialized, and e-commerce stores, as well as through wholesalers. Technos S.A. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
